title: bonyunia minor
intro: Bonyunia minor, also known as the European cranberrybush or guelder rose, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Bonyunia minor include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its potential to reduce the severity of cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of Bonyunia minor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
